name: Rhubarb Crunch 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the rhubarb in an 8x8-inch baking dish.
2. Combine the granulated sugar and 3 tablespoons of all-purpose flour. Sprinkle this mixture over the rhubarb.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the brown sugar, remaining all-purpose flour, oatmeal, and salt. Add the butter and mix as for pastry. Sprinkle this mixture over the rhubarb.
4. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes.
